block_01: With this email, we would like to notify you that the legal relationship between our company and you under the Affiliate Agreement has been terminated and your IQ Option affiliate account has been closed and cannot be accessed as of the date of this email.
block_02: The termination took place upon the conditions set out in clause 9.1 of the Affiliate Agreement following the official notice of termination and/or subsequent notices sent to you earlier each of which informed you of the company's decision to exercise our right for the termination of the Agreement and closure of your IQ Option affiliate account.
block_03: Thank you for having been part of the IQ Option Affiliate Program.
